overall.description: A first-person walk through a dystopian urban drainage channel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves past abandoned vehicles and graffiti-covered walls, watches a flying car pass overhead, and continues under a concrete bridge toward a distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between graffiti wall and wooden barricade with abandoned vehicles

events.description: camera moves past the wooden barricade into more open space

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past abandoned cars and a wooden barricade, examining the graffiti-covered wall

entered.detail: rusted yellow sedan with broken windows and faded paint
dark colored van with red stripe, heavily weathered
large wooden pallet structure blocking part of the path
tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including ACAB and other street art

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow corridor between a graffiti-covered concrete wall and a wooden barricade. Two abandoned vehicles—a yellow sedan and a dark van—sit on the left. The camera moves forward past the wooden structure, revealing more of the tagged wall as it progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete drainage channel with trash piles and distant city views

events.description: exits narrow passage into wide open drainage channel
flying vehicle appears in the sky ahead, approaching slowly

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the dry concrete channel toward the distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering and approaching from the distance, moving toward the camera's position

entered.detail: wide concrete aqueduct with sloped sides and scattered puddles
heaps of garbage bags and debris accumulated against the wall
futuristic aerodyne vehicle with blue and red markings hovering above the channel
large curved concrete overpass structure spanning the channel in the distance
large industrial drainage pipe protruding from the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a vast concrete drainage channel under a bright blue sky. A flying vehicle appears in the distance, approaching slowly. The camera continues forward past trash piles and a large drainage pipe, with a massive concrete bridge visible ahead and the city skyline looming in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: drainage channel with flying vehicle passing overhead

events.description: flying vehicle passes directly overhead from left to right
flying vehicle exits frame to the right, continuing toward the city

agents.ego_description: continuing down the channel as a flying car passes overhead and moves away

notable_agents.action: flying car passing directly overhead, casting a shadow on the ground

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicle dominates the sky as it passes directly overhead, its engines audible. The camera continues forward as the vehicle exits to the right, leaving the channel quiet again. The concrete bridge grows larger ahead, and the ground shows patches of dry grass and standing water.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete bridge underpass with industrial scaffolding

events.description: passing under the concrete bridge structure into shadow
entering deep shadow under the bridge deck, lighting becomes diffused

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete bridge through the shaded underpass, emerging back into sunlight

entered.detail: concrete bridge deck with circular drainage holes and support beams
metal framework structure leaning against the wall under the bridge

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes under the massive concrete bridge, entering a zone of shadow and diffused light. Rusted scaffolding appears on the left wall. The underpass creates a brief sheltered section before opening back up to the bright channel beyond, with the city skyline visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a vast, open drainage channel that leads toward a distant city skyline. It begins in a narrow corridor between a graffiti-covered concrete wall and a wooden barricade, gliding past a yellow sedan and a dark van. As the camera moves forward, the space suddenly expands into a wide concrete channel under a bright blue sky, where a flying vehicle appears in the distance and eventually passes directly overhead. The scene then progresses past trash piles and standing water toward a massive concrete bridge that looms ahead. Finally, the camera passes under the bridge into a zone of shadow and rusted scaffolding before emerging back into the light with the city skyline visible in the distance.
